title: Field filesystem update — disk pressure, deleted tiers, destroyed catalog
motto: Warn before overwrite. Listed deleted goes first; bin is more precious. Catalog keeps the date when bytes are gone.

listed.label: Listed delete
listed.description: Soft-deleted from catalog listing — first to be destroyed under pressure

bin.label: Bin / vault
bin.description: Archival retreat and trash — destroyed after listed tier

disk_pressure.warn_message: Disk is getting full — deleted files will begin being destroyed soon (least important first: listed, then bin).

fields.deleted: soft-delete marker — bytes may still exist
fields.destroyed: bytes gone — catalog row kept for destroy date
